body_txt: A pick-up line is a flirtatious one-line conversation starter, typically used to indicate romantic interest. Well-written pick-up lines are flirty, but not creepy. Delivered well, they can be a humorous way to introduce yourself while making your interests clear. Poorly written pick-up lines are none of the above. They may be overly sexual or crude. They may lack nuance or humor. Or it may be an otherwise decent line, but delivered in an off-putting way. Some people have a knack for saying the right thing to make a good impression on someone who attracts their interest. Some people ... don't. The really inept ones spout worn-out cliches, crude come-ons, and regrettable remarks that are more likely to result in a disdainful eye-roll, a quick retreat (possibly with a blatantly lame excuse ), or even a Megaton Punch than a romantic encounter. This is almost always Played for Laughs , so it's a Comedy Trope . Expect any pickup line involving a pun to generate a corresponding Lame Pun Reaction . See also Compliment Backfire , if an otherwise decent pick-up line is delivered poorly. No Real Life Examples, Please! This is not for criticizing people's pick-up lines. Examples have been sorted in alphabetical order.
